title: fagraea cameronensis
intro: Fagraea cameronensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Gentianaceae, commonly known as the Cameron's frangipani or Bunga Raya. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its leaves and flowers, which are used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Fagraea cameronensis include its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and protect against cell damage. In traditional medicine, the leaves and flowers of the plant are often prepared into teas, infusions, or topical applications to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
